posts.raw_content:
Alex Jones, Tucker Carlson, Marjorie Taylor Greene, Nick Fuentes, Candace Owens, Megyn Kelly, Ian Carroll, Owen Shroyer and many others...

To those on here that act like any of these people are "champions" of MAGA or America First...

Why do none of them ever talk about the SAVE America Act? Why do none of them use their popularity as leverage and pressure to try to get the SAVE America Act? If these big-names actually cared about the United States, then they should really care about the SAVE America Act and use their platforms to amplify demand for it to get passed. But they don't. They don't say a word about it, and they don't seem to give a shit at all.

If they actually cared about the United States, they'd use their platforms to try and organize and galvanize the people against the Democrats in the midterms. But they don't do that, and instead, they seem to actually deliberately help the Democrats win the midterms.

Instead of focusing on the Democrats being the number one enemy of the United States, they antagonize Trump and make him out to be the problem. They amplify the "tRuMp iS OwNeD aNd CoNtRoLlEd bY IsRaEl" psyop and act like it's more important to oppose Israel than to ensure the Democrats don't get back into power.

Instead of increasing pressure to get the SAVE America Act, they talk extensively about Israel and how they're the big bad. They don't encourage Republican voters to turn out in their biggest numbers possible to prevent the Democrats from winning, instead they encourage people to sit out the midterms to essentially ensure the Democrats to win. Or they might even outright encourage people to vote Democrat out of spite, which is what Nick Fuentes has resorted to doing. And no, accelerationism doesn't work.

They are largely responsible for rightwing infighting, slamming Trump and causing division instead of focusing on the more important enemy, the Democrats. Candace largely destroyed a lot of the rightwing unity that was supposed to happen as a result of Charlie Kirk's assassination.

If the Democrats win the midterms, the ones most at fault for it would be the Republicans in Congress, yes, but the influencers and podcasters would not have helped matters *at all* in that case as well and would also be at fault for it too. They don't do a goddamn thing to help us try to win the midterms, in fact they do the opposite.

Give me one good reason why I should listen to any of these influencers or think they're worth trusting.
